prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: ASR-AOCEP-BUN-4PK-U-CLR Product Type: APPAREL Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: 4 Pack ASR Outdoor Clear Emergency Poncho Set Description: Don't be caught without these Emergency Ponchos when you need them most. Storms can roll in fast and if you are not prepared, you will not be a happy camper.

This 4-Pack of Emergency Ponchos are perfect for stocking up supply. Great for keeping one handy in the car, backpack, boat, RV, home, and more!

Be Prepared for Stormy Weather Camping, Hiking, Outdoors, Emergencies, Hunting, Fishing, and More! Search Terms: emergency weather rain protection rain gear winter gear hiking gear Features: - Universal Fit: One Size Fits Most All (61" x 65") - Material: Polyethylene - Attached Hood with Adjustable String - Compact and Lightweight - Reusable === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 4-Pack Clear Emergency Poncho Set

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor 4-pk Clear Emergency Poncho Set

anthropic.title_differentiation: Universal Fit, Attached Hood, Compact And Lightweight, Reusable, Perfect For Camping Hiking And Emergencies

openai.title_differentiation: Set Of 4, One Size Fits Most 61" X 65", Attached Hood, Adjustable String, Compact, Lightweight, Reusable
